Acme Corp Board Meeting Minutes
Date: 2024-05-20
Location: Conference Room B, 100 Enterprise Ave

Attendees: Alice Johnson (CEO), Bob Chen (CTO), Carol Davis (CFO)

Agenda Items:

1. Q2 Revenue Review
   Carol presented Q2 results showing $2.4M revenue, up 18% YoY.
   Operating margins improved to 22%.

2. Product Launch Update
   Bob confirmed the Enterprise Suite v3.0 will launch on June 15.
   Beta testing shows 94% customer satisfaction.

3. Hiring Plan
   Alice announced approval for 5 new engineering positions.
   Targeting August hires.

Meeting adjourned at 11:45 AM.
Next meeting: June 10, 2024.
